title: Perplexity Computer
summary: Originally an internal Slack tool, it performed $776M in labor-equivalent work for subscribers. Agents can coordinate Claude Code and GPT Codex to handle multi-step workflows automatically.
takeaway: AI agent orchestrator that codes, researches, and manages tasks across apps

title: Claude 4.6 Opus
summary: Lowkey the technical leader now with 1M context in beta. Agent Teams for parallel task coordination, adaptive thinking controls. 59% of devs prefer Sonnet 4.6 over the last version.
takeaway: First Opus-class model w/ 1M token context window and 128K output

title: Pika Video Chat Skill
summary: Any AI agent can now integrate live video chat—agents get a face and remember personality across convos. Marks the shift from text-only toward actual embodied AI interactions.
takeaway: Real-time video & voice for AI agents powered by PikaStream1.0 model
